emails.subject: Re: Palladium Insurance Letter of Credit
emails.body: Tanya I just got back from vacation to find this waiting. Do we need to do anything? Mark Forwarded by Mark Taylor/HOU/ECT on 10/04/2000 01:35 PM Shari Stack 09/19/2000 01:17 PM

emails.subject: Re: Palladium Insurance Letter of Credit
emails.body: Tanya I just got back from vacation to find this waiting. Do we need to do anything? Mark Forwarded by Mark Taylor/HOU/ECT on 10/04/2000 01:35 PM Shari Stack 09/19/2000 01:17 PM

emails.subject: Re: Palladium Insurance Letter of Credit
emails.body: We invoiced them for the look back period for the deals that settled March 31. I am still waiting to hear if they paid from our back office (per Palladium, they paid on Monday). I have pulled the LC from the vault, and I am waiting for the pmt confirmation before I send back. If you want a good laugh, give me a call and I will tell you what the desk wanted to try to do. Tanya From: Mark Taylor on 10/04/2000 01:36 PM

emails.subject: Re: Palladium Insurance Letter of Credit
